items.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję: 
🎬mentoring aktorski 
🎬nagranie wizytówek w Warszawie
🎬montaż demo aktorskiego zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów obsady 

Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :)

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować  
✅ jak samemu w łatwy sposób przemontować demo pod konkretny casting 

Szczegóły priv

Statyści Łódź

Dzień dobry,
Do etiudy studentów Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukujemy STATYSTÓW do roli uczniów w szkole.

- Panie ok. 30 lat
- Pani ok. 60 Lat
- Panowie ok. 40 lat
- Studentki i studenci

📍 Łódź
🗓️ 28-29.04 (kontynuacja scen, wymagana obecność na obu dniach) 

Doświadczenie nie jest wymagane, zapraszamy wszystkich zainteresowanych:) 

Zgłoszenia (imię i nazwisko, zdjęcie, miasto oraz telefon) proszę przesyłać na maila w.blawat@student.filmschool.lodz.pl 

Projekt non profit, zapewniamy ciepły posiłek. 

W razie pytań proszę pisać priv, chętnie odpowiem na wszelkie pytania:)

message.text: Raj Kumar remains one of the most iconic figures in Indian cinema. Known for his deep voice, powerful dialogue delivery, and unmatched screen presence, he brought a rare intensity to every role. His unique style and fearless personality made him stand out in every film he appeared in. He wasn’t just acting—he was creating moments that audiences would remember forever.”###Rose’s##Teapot🎥🎥🎥🎥🎥📽️📽️📽️📽️📽️👌👌👌👌

items.text:
**Poszukiwany aktor lub aktorka 40+ do stałej współpracy**

Poszukujemy aktora lub aktorkę w wieku od 40 lat, głównie z okolic Katowic do stałej współpracy przy tworzeniu materiałów reklamowych. 

Wymagania:
* wiek: 40+ 
* brak udziału w reklamach płatnych w branży prawnej bądź innej przez okres minimum 2 miesiące
* dyspozycyjność

Zlecenie płatne. 

Prosimy o zgłoszenia z filmikiem 10-15 sekundowym z przedstawieniem wizerunku.

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na mail: h.wojtaczka@adgen.pl

items.text: Black female actor needed.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL: Coretta Scott King
We are seeking a talented Black actress to portray Coretta Scott King in an upcoming stage production exploring the life, legacy, and resilience of one of history’s most influential civil rights leaders.
Role: Coretta Scott King
Production Type: Theatre in London 
Performance Date: April 2027
Coretta Scott King was a powerful force in the Civil Rights Movement—an activist, author, and leader in her own right. This role requires an actress who can embody strength, grace, emotional depth, and unwavering conviction. The performance will explore her personal journey, public leadership, and enduring legacy.
Requirements:
Black actress, age range approx 35 - 55
Strong dramatic acting ability
Ability to convey emotional nuance and historical authenticity
Vocal strength (singing ability is a plus, as Coretta had a background in music)
Experience in stage performance preferred
Prepare a 1–2 minute dramatic monologue (preferably related to themes of justice, resilience, or leadership)
Compensation: Paid

Send headshot, resume CV to :
centenaryprojects@gmail.com

Join us in bringing the story of an extraordinary woman to life on stage.

items.text: 👇👇👇 This could be you

sharedPost.text:
MODEL CASTING CALL ✨

Glam Gallery is looking for the Face of Glam Gallery 2026!

The search is for someone confident, photogenic and passionate about beauty, hair and photography to represent our brand throughout 2026.

The selected model will receive:
• Professional photoshoots and photos throughout the year on collaboration basis
• Hair styling transformations
• Feature on Instagram/ Facebook & promotional material
• Commission opportunities 

To apply:
1️⃣ Follow instagram account @glamgalleryleeds
2️⃣ Send a DM with 3 photos of yourself (face, hair, full body)
3️⃣ Tell us why you would love to represent Glam Gallery

Applications close: 29th March 2026

There is no age restrictions however under 18 would require parent consent.

Tag someone who should apply! 💫

And yes, this will provide you with the content for the year!! ✨️✨️✨️
#brandambassador  #modelcall l #faceofthebrand  #influencersearch  #modelsearch #collaboration #paidpartnership #brandrep #brandrepsearch

🚀 JOIN THE CAPED CRUSADERS TEAM – SUPERHEROES & PRINCESSES WANTED! 🦸‍♀️👑
We’re expanding our epic squad of energetic performers! Bring magic to birthdays, festivals, weddings, events nationwide ✨
We’ve already partnered with several leading organisations and we’re proud to be the official superhero performers for Children’s Rugby festivals across the UK! 🏉🇬🇧
Based in London, Essex & surrounding areas – we travel the whole country! 🚗 Applicants MUST be able to drive. Dancers & singers? Huge advantage! 💃🎤
Ready to make every event legendary?
Call/WhatsApp 07535 822338 or DM us to apply NOW!
#CapedCrusaders #SuperheroJobs #PrincessPerformers #KidsEntertainment #PartyPerformersWanted #HiringNow #LondonEvents #EssexEvents #UKFestivals #ChildrensRugby #SuperheroParty #JoinOurTeam 🦸‍♂️✨🎉

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – UNPAID SHORT FILM “GETHSEMANE”

Hello all!

I’m a Year 2 Film student from Arts University Plymouth, currently casting for a 5-minute experimental psychological short film about a man trapped in a pressure chamber who must choose between clinging to a haunting love or sacrificing a part of himself to survive.

This is a minimal-dialogue, visually driven film relying on physical performance, symbolic movement, and emotional expression.

📍 Location: Arts University Plymouth

📅 Shoot Dates: 1 April 2026

If you’re interested, please email or DM me with:

• Name

• Age

• Headshot/photo

• Any acting experience (not required)

Student actors and newcomers are very welcome.

Thank you!

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – "ALICE" for new schools performance/workshops ALICE IN OPERALAND (London/Devon)

We are looking for a singer/actress for the role of Alice in our Development and Pilot Delivery of this exciting new childrens' show in early-mid MAY 2026

🌟 The ideal candidate will have

·      harmony skills

·      strong music theatre legit voice or high mezzo or soprano opera voice.

·      strong acting ability and youthful energy

·      ideally also have experience of workshops with children or teaching drama/music at primary age

🎭 We particularly welcome candidates  from the Global Majority

This is a paid opportunity.

For full details – dates and fees – please visit 
https://rogueoperaoutreach.org/castingcall/

#CastingCall#MusicalTheatre #LondonActors #OpenCasting #TheatreLife #Auditions #NewWork

items.text:
🇺🇸 DANCE INSTRUCTORS WANTED — Work in the USA! 💃🕺
Ballroom & Latin dance teachers — take your talent beyond borders and build your career in the United States. Turn your passion for dance into a professional international opportunity.

We are looking for motivated and skilled instructors ready for long-term contracts in established dance studios across the USA.

📌 Full details:

https://t.me/talentguideagency/2405

📝 Apply here:

https://talentguide.agency/dance-teacher-in-usa/#register-form

Or send your CV, photos, and videos directly to:

📄 talentguide.agency.usa@gmail.com

Serious careers. Real studios. International growth.

✨ Let’s take your dance journey to the next level.

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Hi everyone! 

We're casting for the short film 'The Way of the Lamb', shooting end of April/Early May around Copenhagen.It’s a period piece set in 1920s Denmark. 

The film follows a boy’s spiritual discovery and explores life after death.

You can read more about the project here: https://filmdaily.co/indie-film/film-festivals/way-of-the-lamb-daniel-knights-spiritual-coming-of-age-wins-first-franzi-shorts-competition/

**We're looking for 5 roles:**

-8-10 year-old boy (Protagonist) 

-10-13 year-old female (Sister) 

-35-50 year-old male (Dad) 

-+50 year-old female (Grandma) 

+50 year-old male (Priest) 

The film will be spoken in Danish, so no English fluency is required, but advised, as we're working with an international crew. 

We will be holding auditions for these roles, so please email us on **wayofthelamb@franzifilms.com** if you're interested or know someone who might be :)

Unfortunately, as it's a short film (and it's very tough to get a budget for these projects), nobody is getting a salary. We're looking for someone who's mostly looking to have fun and go on this ride with us for the love of it, get good material for their reel, and go to festivals. 

I'm directing, Zoe Stiletano is producing, Daniel Knight is the writer, and Nick Gray is the DP. It's produced by www.franzifilms.com 

Looking forward to getting you on the team! 🙌

items.text:
MAGAZINE REQUEST 
**Are you a "messy mum" - and proud of it? £100 fee. **

I'm looking for women who are happy to show off their not-picture-perfect home when they share their life on social media or have visitors.

They don't have a problem with lots of clutter/mess/things not being very clean and don't care what others may think of their approach to housekeeping.

This article is a positive, non judgemental one about women choosing to reject the pressures to have a spotless, organised, curated home and take a much more relaxed approach to how they live. 

Perhaps you feel your time is better spent on hobbies or with your family, or you just hate housework and don't believe a very tidy home is essential. Open to any and all reasons for embracing this trend.

Full readback given and £100 thank you fee.

Please contact me for more information on eimearohaganfreelance@gmail.com

items.text:
Casting Call for university project:

Good morning, this is a casting call for three actresses for a University project required for our grade, Under the Table

The film takes place in a 1950s newspaper office, following three women in the aftermath of an argument in a meeting room, little do they know, one of them has found a deadly weapon that was laying right under their noses.

The roles are:

Abigail Fields: A confident but hot headed character who feels disrespected by the people around her.

Jenny Saunders: An easy going character who doesn't like to rock the boat, but is quick to frustration when someone isn't listening to what she's saying.

Kathy Andrews: A shy, reserved person, good at her job but quiet to a fault, and paralysed with fear at the object she finds.

 Rehearsal dates are still TBD and will be based around actor availability 

The actual day of filming will be the 1st of May.

As this is a university project work will unfortunately be unpaid and actors local to Southampton are preferred, with small travel costs able to be negotiated 

Thank you, if you are interested please shoot me an email or message my instagram at @jfoz_515

I’m interested and local to Southampton

items.text: Black female actor needed.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL: Coretta Scott King
We are seeking a talented Black actress to portray Coretta Scott King in an upcoming stage production exploring the life, legacy, and resilience of one of history’s most influential civil rights leaders.
Role: Coretta Scott King
Production Type: Theatre in London 
Performance Date: April 2027
Coretta Scott King was a powerful force in the Civil Rights Movement—an activist, author, and leader in her own right. This role requires an actress who can embody strength, grace, emotional depth, and unwavering conviction. The performance will explore her personal journey, public leadership, and enduring legacy.
Requirements:
Black actress, age range approx 35 - 55
Strong dramatic acting ability
Ability to convey emotional nuance and historical authenticity
Vocal strength (singing ability is a plus, as Coretta had a background in music)
Experience in stage performance preferred
Prepare a 1–2 minute dramatic monologue (preferably related to themes of justice, resilience, or leadership)
Compensation: Paid

Send headshot, resume CV to :
centenaryprojects@gmail.com

Join us in bringing the story of an extraordinary woman to life on stage.

items.text:
Craxis Studios Casting Call for Indie Film
Title: Despondence

Genre: Coming of Age/Drama

Logline: A sick teenager flees his abusive home in search of freedom, meeting new people as he goes, but as life on the road unravels and the weight of what he left behind begins to close in, he’s forced to confront the truth that some things can’t be outrun.

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Craxis Studios

Contact information: craxisstudios@gmail.com

Run Time: 45min-1hr

Compensation: While monetary compensation currently isn’t possible, the studio hopes that it can be, as of now Compensation will be in Food and Credits. 

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume, and reel if you have one. 

Filming Location: Denver-Aurora 

Project Description: Despondence is a character-driven short film about grief, memory, and the illusion of escape. It follows a teenager who leaves behind a troubled home in search of something better, only to confront the emotional weight of what he can’t outrun. Despondence also being the start of our studio.

CASTING CALL
Neo-Western - Dead Company

Denver Area

Logline: When a gunslinger is mortally wounded in pursuit of her brother’s killer, Death gives her another chance to finish her revenge.

Self tape auditions: Now - April 4th 2026

In Person Auditions: April 4th 2026 (address provided later)

Probable shoot dates: June 5-14 2026

Email haven@havenmarrs.com for script and sides. Reach out via email for any questions

items.text:
INDEPENDENT FEATURE FILM CASTING CALL:

Genre: Existential horror

Title: Beyond Now 

Logline: A group of close-knit friends get together for one last hurrah. What awaits them are horrors that will change their lives in ways they could never prepare for.

Production company: Bench-Top Productions 

Contact info: beyondnowproduction@protonmail.com

IMPORTANT NOTE: These roles have hard shoot dates over April, May, and October. If submitting please confirm full availability for the dates listed for each specific role. The audition deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline. 

ROLES:

Hailey, Lead female: Early to Mid 30’s

Mom of the group. Overly Responsible. Protective of her friends and family. Cautious about her partner Ethan’s Anxiety. Hailey organized this trip as a final ‘hurrah’ to announce her pregnancy.

Shoot dates: 4/9, 4/10, 4/13, 4/14, 4/17, 4/18, 4/19, 4/20, 4/21, 5/9, 5/10, 5/11, 5/12, 5/16, 10/16, 10/17, 10/18 

Brooke, Supporting female: Late 20’s - Early 30’s 

Wannabe Instagram influencer. Super jealous of her friend Megan and her “so-called career.” One of the class clowns of the group. She has a ‘Team Rocket Jesse and James’ dynamic with her best friend Chris from their years working together in a coffee shop. Strongly copes with humor. Hyperfixates on her special interests: photography, true crime and mystics.

Shoot dates: 4/10, 4/13, 4/14, 4/18, 4/19, 4/20, 5/7, 5/10, 10/16, 10/17, 10/18 

Compensation: IMDB credit, meal and reel. 

Union status: Non-union

Shoot locations: Conifer, Golden and Denver CO

AUDITION INFORMATION: Auditions will be held via selftape. To receive sides and selftape instructions, please send a headshot, resume and reel to beyondnowproduction@protonmail.com with which role you're submitting for and a confirmation of availability for the dates listed for that role. The deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline. 

IMDB: [https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2)

The deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline.

items.text:
🚨 AKUT CASTING – vi mangler skuespillere til i morgen! 🚨 Hej alle!
Vi er en gruppe gymnasieelever i 3.G, der er i gang med vores elevproduktion, og desværre er nogle af vores skuespillere sprunget fra i sidste øjeblik – så vi mangler AKUT folk!

🎭 Vi søger 3 roller:

 • Christian – hovedrollens kæreste

 • Rank – Christians ven

 • Vega – hovedrollens veninde

👥 Derudover søger vi også statister!

🎉 Scene: Det er en festscene, så du skal møde op i festtøj. Viben er lidt “Nordsjælland”-miljø.

📍 Location: Hvidovre

📅 Optagedage:

 • 27. marts (i morgen!) kl. 19:00–23:00

 • 2., 3. og 4. april (ikke sikkert alle dage bruges, men sæt gerne tid af)

💸 OBS: Det er en low budget elevproduktion, så der er desværre ikke løn – men til gengæld får du erfaring, optagelser til showreel og en fed oplevelse!

Hvis du har lyst til at være med (eller kender nogen der har!), så skriv hurtigst muligt 🙏

Vi håber virkelig, nogen kan hjælpe med kort varsel – det ville betyde mega meget for os! ❤️

items.text:
CASTING ACTORS FOR FIGHT SCENE IN FEATURE FILM!!

Title: Saturdays

Genre: Thriller/Comedy

Logline: After accidentally taking a new designer drug on the way to a Halloween party, three broke nobodies become viral vigilantes in a city on the edge but their rise to infamy puts them in the cross-hairs of a charismatic cartel leader.

Role:

Carlos (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Hugo (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Knuckles (20-40) Drug packer

Diesel (20-40) Drug packer

Brick (20-40) Drug packer

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Loste Films

Contact Information: luke@lostefilms.com

Run Time: Feature

Compensation: Catering/Crafty provided during proof of concept shoot. Compensation for future shoot dates is open to negotiation.

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume and reel. Stunt experience preferred.

Shooting Schedule: March 28-29th. 11am call time both days.

Filming Location: Denver

Project Description: Saturdays is an upcoming feature film we’re currently shooting the beginning of to use as a proof of concept. The scenes in the proof of concept are still being used in the final movie, which will be shot later on in the year. We’re ideally looking for actors with stunt experience.

IMDB Link: [https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/)

items.text:
Title: Lamotrigine 

Genre: Drama 

Logline: A woman’s day is derailed after retrieving an old jacket from her ex. 

Roles: 

Sophie (F, mid 20s): Madi’s good friend who is now married and living in the suburbs. 

Luna (F, early-mid 20s-30s): Trans woman. An old classmate of Madi’s who reconnects with her at a train station. 

Dream Woman: (F, 20s-30s): A tall figure who appears in Madi’s dream. 

Director: Ryleigh Dorman

Producer: Frances McIlvain

Indie, micro-budget, nonunion 

Compensation: Flat fee, negotiable 

Shooting Schedule: Looking at a handful of dates across April-June of 2026. 

Location: In & around the Denver-Boulder area 

Audition Information: email mcilvainbiz@gmail.com with headshot and reel or relevant reference material.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of lighting

topComments.text: would you accept a monologue recording?

Hi! I saw this opportunity and I’m really interested. I’m a teen actress with theater experience and would love to learn more about it. Could you share the details on how to get involved? Thank you! I am in Colorado.

Hi! I am casting for a short student film shooting on Friday, April 3rd, looking to lock actors ASAP.

Roles:

Female Lead (25-40): Expressive, comfortable with stylized, campy tone.

Male Role (25-40): Intimidating presence, open to silly, heightened performance.

Project:

Campy sci-fi with a strong focus on costume, makeup, and lighting.

Stylized, visually-driven, and fun (not heavy drama).

Shoot Details:

Date: Friday, April 3rd

Time: 9am call- 5pm wrap

Location: CCA Lowry Studios  

Perks: 

Lunch + Snacks provided 

Great opportunity for footage and collaboration

Looking for:

Reliable and communicative

Comfortable taking direction

Open to exaggerated, stylized performance 

Experience level is flexible! 

Thank you!

items.text:
**🔔Casting Call🔔**
We're seeking an East Asian child actor for our Music Video shooting in LA area in mid April. Please DM me♪

**Description:**
LA-based J-pop artist seeks a young East Asian lead for the cinematic music video planned for Grammy submission. 

This deeply personal project depicts the artist's real-life journey of overcoming childhood bullying and choosing resilience. We are looking for a soulful young actress to portray the "Inner Child" who transforms pain into hope.

**Project & location:**
2-day-shoot (3-4 hours each) in mid - late April, at studios in LA area.

**Rate of Pay:**
$200 total for 2 days. (each 3-4H maximum) Non union. Copy, credit, meals.

**Role: Younger Self (Lead)**

**[Physical Characteristics]**
 East Asian female (Ages 10-13 / preferably looks 12). Expressive eyes that can convey deep internal emotions without words. A natural, grounded presence.

**[Personality]** 
A sensitive, highly intelligent soul. Deeply introverted due to her environment, yet possesses a fierce sense of justice and an unyielding spirit. She is a survivor cloaked in quietness.

**[Character Arc]** **From Shadow to Light:**
 She begins trapped in the darkness of severe bullying and isolation, contemplating the ultimate escape. However, she undergoes a profound internal transformation—realizing that her existence is her greatest victory. She moves from a state of silent despair to a powerful, life-affirming decision to live and pursue her dreams, saving the woman she will one day become.

items.text:
Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show 

Dieses kurze Interview mit Ralf ist in einem persönlichen Moment vor dem Studio entstanden, im Umfeld der heute-show und kurz vor unserem Bühnenmoment zur Folge vom 20. März. Für mich war das ein sympathisches, spontanes und pointiertes Gespräch, in dem sofort spürbar wurde, wie viel Präsenz, Charme und Schlagfertigkeit Ralf Scharrer mitbringt. 

Im Mittelpunkt stehen sein Name, seine öffentliche Wirkung, seine markante Ausstrahlung und genau die Leichtigkeit, mit der aus wenigen Sätzen ein unterhaltsamer Clip wird. 

Viele kennen Ralf Scharrer als Schauspieler, doch in diesem kurzen Ausschnitt zeigt sich vor allem auch seine persönliche Art, direkt, humorvoll und mit einem sicheren Gespür für Wirkung. Genau das macht solche kurzen Begegnungen für mich interessant. Sie sind ungeplant, nahbar und oft viel prägnanter als lange Gespräche. Gerade deshalb wollte ich diesen Moment festhalten und mit Dir teilen. 

Wenn Dir solche spontanen Interviewmomente aus dem Medienumfeld gefallen, freue ich mich über Deinen Kommentar, Dein Like und Dein Abo. Schreib mir gern, welcher Satz oder welcher Moment von Ralf Scharrer Dir in diesem Clip am meisten im Kopf geblieben ist. 

Danke, Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeisse #heuteshow #ZDF #Interview #Schauspiel #Medienmoment #Köln #Kurzinterview #TVMoment 

Das gezeigte Kurzinterview entstand vor Beginn des Drehs in einem Flurbereich vor dem Studio im Umfeld der Produktion, zeigt keine vertraulichen Inhalte oder unzulässigen Bildmotive und dokumentiert ausschließlich einen persönlichen, eigenständig entstandenen Begegnungsmoment zwischen Christian Weiße und Ralf Scharrer.

📽️ Pełnometrażowy film fabularny ❗
🙎Poszukuję rosyjskojęzycznych aktorów (bez akcentu) w wieku 18 - 30 lat do głównej roli.

📆 Termin: Lato

📍 Lokalizacja: Ryga, Łotwa 🇱🇻

Oferta platna

Aktualne zdjęcia (twarz oraz sylwetka), wiek i wzrost.

Wizytówka w języku rosyjskim. 

Mail do kontaktu: denactors@gmail.com

lub w prywatnej wiadomości

items.text:
🎬 Zapraszam do udanej współpracy! 🎬
RAFAŁ GRZYB – www.grzybnaplanie.com / https://etalenta.me/rafal-grzyb

Jeżeli właśnie szukasz kreatywnego aktora, który potrafi wcielić się w różnorodne role, oddać prawdziwe emocje i wnieść na plan pozytywną energię, to serdecznie zapraszam do kontaktu! 🤩 Uwielbiam pracę na planie, swobodnie czuję się przed kamerą i chętnie podejmuję nowe wyzwania.

Skontaktuj się ze mną i opowiedz mi o swoim projekcie:
📞 604 478 542
📩 ir.grzyb@gmail.com
🌐 www.grzybnaplanie.com

 

https://www.facebook.com/GrzybnaPlanie

message.text:
Woww😲💥I truly admire the incredible strength in their knees—the very foundation behind those breathtaking jumps and flawless control. 🩰
🎟️ Visit https://1kb.link/vG6zC9 for information on theaters and tickets
⚡️ Don’t miss the chance to experience this magical performance live—where classical artistry meets peak physical beauty. 💛

#ShenYun #ShenYun2026

sharedPost.text:
🔥 In Austria — a land shaped by the legacy of Mozart and Strauss — music isn’t just heard… it’s lived. 🎼✨
💃 When exquisite dance meets masterful composition, the result is pure magic on stage.
🎟️ Choose your best seats here: https://1kb.link/gSQBne
💥 This isn’t just a performance. It’s an immersion into beauty, culture, and timeless artistry.
💛 Treat yourself to an unforgettable evening of elegance.

#ShenYun #ShenYun2026

sharedPost.text:
💥 Have you ever been mesmerized by the strength and elegance of world-class dancers? 😮

The male dancers of Shen Yun embody a rare harmony of power, precision, and grace—every leap and landing feels effortless, yet extraordinary. 🎼✨

🎟️ Visit https://1kb.link/9e4lV8 for information on theaters and tickets ⚡️Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance.

user.name: Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation

items.text:
Es gibt Lieder, die man nicht nur hört, sondern die etwas im eigenen Inneren berühren und sichtbar machen. 

"Die Erste deiner Art" von Helene Fischer ist für mich genau so ein Song. Nicht nur wegen seiner klaren Botschaft über Mut, Anderssein und innere Stärke, sondern auch, weil sich darin vieles wiederfindet, was ich selbst nach außen tragen möchte. In meiner Selbstdarstellung auf Social Media geht es nie nur um schöne Bilder oder einzelne Momente. Es geht mir darum, Haltung zu zeigen, Persönlichkeit sichtbar zu machen und Menschen das Gefühl zu geben, dass Echtheit mehr Kraft hat als jede perfekte Fassade. 

Gerade dieses Lied erinnert mich daran, wie wichtig es ist, sich nicht kleiner zu machen, nur weil man nicht in jede Erwartung anderer passt. Wer seinen eigenen Weg geht, aneckt, trotzdem weitermacht und sich nicht verbiegt, sendet eine Botschaft, die weit über Musik hinausgeht. Genau dieser Mix aus Selbstbewusstsein, Verletzlichkeit, Ausstrahlung und einer klaren inneren Linie ist auch das, was ich mit meinen Inhalten vermitteln möchte. 

Für mich ist dieser Song deshalb nicht nur Musik, sondern auch Inspiration für meine eigene Präsenz. Er steht für die Art von Ausstrahlung, die ich zeigen will, aufrichtig, mutig, nahbar und mit dem Wunsch, anderen ebenfalls Kraft zu geben. Denn Social Media kann mehr sein als Oberfläche. Es kann ein Ort sein, an dem Persönlichkeit, Entwicklung und ehrliche Impulse ihren Platz haben. 

Vielleicht liegt genau darin die stärkste Wirkung, nicht so zu sein wie alle anderen, sondern bewusst man selbst zu bleiben. 

Welcher Song beschreibt Dich oder Deinen Weg gerade am besten? 

Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation

#HeleneFischer #DieErsteDeinerArt #Selbstdarstellung #SocialMedia #Persönlichkeit

Rechtliche Angaben zur Musik:
Titel: Die Erste deiner Art
Interpretin: Helene Fischer
Veröffentlichungsjahr: 2021
Quelle des Songtexts: Musixmatch
Songwriter: Helene Fischer / Robin Haefs / Alina Wichmann / Keno Seferagic

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.summary:
Es gibt Lieder, die man nicht nur hört, sondern die etwas im eigenen Inneren berühren und sichtbar machen. 

"Die Erste deiner Art" von Helene Fischer ist für mich genau so ein Song. Nicht nur wegen seiner klaren Botschaft über Mut, Anderssein und innere Stärke, sondern auch, weil sich darin vieles wiederfindet, was ich selbst nach außen tragen möchte. In meiner Selbstdarstellung auf Social Media geht es nie nur um schöne Bilder oder einzelne Momente. Es geht mir darum, Haltung zu zeigen, Persönlichkeit sichtbar zu machen und Menschen das Gefühl zu geben, dass Echtheit mehr Kraft hat als jede perfekte Fassade. 

Gerade dieses Lied erinnert mich daran, wie wichtig es ist, sich nicht kleiner zu machen, nur weil man nicht in jede Erwartung anderer passt. Wer seinen eigenen Weg geht, aneckt, trotzdem weitermacht und sich nicht verbiegt, sendet eine Botschaft, die weit über Musik hinausgeht. Genau dieser Mix aus Selbstbewusstsein, Verletzlichkeit, Ausstrahlung und einer klaren inneren Linie ist auch das, was ich mit meinen Inhalten vermitteln möchte. 

Für mich ist dieser Song deshalb nicht nur Musik, sondern auch Inspiration für meine eigene Präsenz. Er steht für die Art von Ausstrahlung, die ich zeigen will, aufrichtig, mutig, nahbar und mit dem Wunsch, anderen ebenfalls Kraft zu geben. Denn Social Media kann mehr sein als Oberfläche. Es kann ein Ort sein, an dem Persönlichkeit, Entwicklung und ehrliche Impulse ihren Platz haben. 

Vielleicht liegt genau darin die stärkste Wirkung, nicht so zu sein wie alle anderen, sondern bewusst man selbst zu bleiben. 

Welcher Song beschreibt Dich oder Deinen Weg gerade am besten? 

Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation

#HeleneFischer #DieErsteDeinerArt #Selbstdarstellung #SocialMedia #Persönlichkeit

Rechtliche Angaben zur Musik:
Titel: Die Erste deiner Art
Interpretin: Helene Fischer
Veröffentlichungsjahr: 2021
Quelle des Songtexts: Musixmatch
Songwriter: Helene Fischer / Robin Haefs / Alina Wichmann / Keno Seferagic

items.text:
CASTING IS OPEN FOR OUR DEBUT FEATURE FILM PAID POSITION

Filming is taking place in June and will be shot in the Woking Surrey area

we are looking for a male child actor playing age between 5-10 To portray the character of Elijah, who is non-verbal and autistic, a variety of skills and qualities are necessary:

1. Research and Understanding: It's essential to have an understanding of autism, particularly non-verbal autism. This includes recognizing the diversity of experiences and behaviors within the autism spectrum. The role requires an empathetic approach to connect authentically with Elijah's experiences and emotions while being sensitive to the nuances of his communication style.

2. We require legal guardian/ parents to be present during auditions

3. we will be working with the local authorities and adhering to the strict rules enforced by local authorities via Child Performance Licences, which mandate maximum time on set, limits on on-camera time, and specific breaks for meals and rest etc�

please apply by sending your details and spotlight to our email address at tideswellproduction@gmail.com

thank you for reading and hope you are all have a fantastic rest of the week

CASTING CALL - PAID ROLES

Hey everyone,

Hope you are all well! :D 

We are casting for a project we'll be filming next month, April 18th in Manchester. 

Please see the casting call here: https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3128038/the-worst-day-of-the-year/

If you know anyone that would be interested feel free to share it.

You can also contact me on rodrigues_acarolina@hotmail.com if you are interested on any of the roles. 

Thank you! xx

items.text: Would anyone be able to point me in the right direction ? I had professional work as a child , and miss it so much . I’d love to do some sort of androgynous or vampy theatre role or something . I feel I have so much more to offer and felt a bit rejected and replaceable as a young child actor 🥲 if anyone has any advice I’d really appreciate it X x

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – NYC (NON-UNION / INDEPENDENT)
Short Film: Echoes of You / Yourself (5–7 min)
📍 Location: Washington Heights, NYC
📅 Shoot Dates: TBD (between April 1 – May 10)
💰 Compensation: $50 + copy of film + travel covered + light snacks

ABOUT THE FILM
An intimate, single-location short about longing and the passage of time. Through piano and monologue, two versions of the same person - past and future - intertwine, confronting memory, desire, and the quiet weight of what was never fully let go.

ROLES
1. YOUNG SELF (LEAD) Male or Female | 20s

* Must play piano (emotional fragments, not full recital)
* Strong monologue ability (yearning, vulnerability, introspection)
* Comfortable with close-ups + intimate performance

A deeply emotional and self-reflective individual consumed by longing and fear of losing connection. They replay memories, searching for meaning in what was left unsaid, struggling to let go of a love that grounds them; even when it hurts.

2. OLDER SELF (LEAD) Male or Female | 40s–50s

* Piano experience preferred (simple/emotive playing)
* Subtle, reflective, nuanced performance
* Ability to mirror younger self physically + emotionally

An older version of the Young Self; more restrained, but still carrying the same longing. Time has softened the intensity, but not the feeling. They begin to recognize the emotional patterns they’ve carried for years.

AUDITION INSTRUCTIONS
* 1–2 minute monologue (themes: longing, memory, reflection)
* Optional: short piano clip (simple + emotional is perfect)
* Send: headshot, resume, audition video
📩 email to submit items to! Anaselenax@gmail.com

DIRECTOR’S NOTE 
Looking for authenticity and emotional depth. This is a quiet, cinematic piece- where stillness, music, and subtle expression carry the story.

If you know someone who fits this, tag them or share! 🎹✨

topComments.text: Hi! I saw this opportunity and I’m really interested. I’m a teen actress with theater experience and would love to learn more about it. Could you share the details on how to get involved? Thank you! I am in Colorado.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - seeking volunteers for micro-budget short film
**CASTING ORCHESTRA MUSICIANS – SHORT FILM (LA)**

We’re seeking **background performers to portray orchestra musicians** for a short film shooting in Los Angeles.

**Details**
• Age: 18–35
• All genders and ethnicities encouraged
• Should be able to **convincingly play an orchestral instrument on camera**
• Musicians welcome to bring their instrument for visual realism
• **No music will be performed or recorded** (visual only)

**Shoot Dates:** April 3–5, 2026 (may work 1 or 2 days)
**Location:** Los Angeles
**Union:** SAG-AFTRA Micro-Budget Agreement

**Compensation:**
Crafty + credit + copy of the film

**To submit:**
Email **kelleyewerner@gmail.com** with:

• Name
• Playable age
• Instrument(s) you play
• Phone number
• Photo/headshot
• Availability (April 4 and/or 5)

**Subject line:**
Concerto Background Submission – Your Name + Orchestra

items.text:
**🎬 Casting Call — Kandor Kin**

**Vertical Micro-Drama Series · Burbank, CA · March 30th**

**UNPAID · PORTFOLIO / REEL CREDIT**

We're casting two lead roles for **Kandor Kin** — a vertical narrative series following a self-sustaining creative collective. Shot in one day, three episodes, one location. Intimate, dialogue-driven, cinematic.

This is an unpaid opportunity. We're looking for actors who want a quality project for their portfolio and a team that takes the work seriously.

OPEN ROLES

**ASHA — Lead Producer**

BLACK MAN · 30S · OPEN TO TYPE

The architect of the collective. He leads through quiet authority — structured, intentional, every word chosen. He doesn't raise his voice because he doesn't have to. Think stillness as power. He's built something real and he knows it. The role requires presence more than performance.

**ZORA — Member in Training**

WOMAN · 20S · OPEN ETHNICITY

She arrives guarded and leaves with her shoulders down for the first time in a while. Her arc is almost entirely physical — a slow exhale across the episode. Most of what she communicates happens between the lines. Looking for someone who can make a salad order feel like the end of a journey.

**SHOOT DETAILS**

TIME1:00 PM – 8:00 PM

LOCATION: Burbank, CA (full address on confirmation)

FORMATVertical (9:16) — shot for mobile

To submit — comment with the role you're interested in and a brief note about yourself. Sides will be sent to those selected for a self-tape.

topComments.text: I’d be interested in the role of Zora! I have over 20 verticals I was in since last year!

Model Casting Call - 4/12/26 at 2pm at 52 Rochester Public Market 💃
Car & Fashion Show - 8/16/26 🔥
🗣️ See original post for more details about the casting call.

sharedPost.text:
💃 MODEL CASTING CALL 🏎️
​Regals & Runways is looking for models to pair with the most iconic rides in Rochester for the ULTIMATE Car & Fashion Experience, Sunday, August 16th, 2026! This event is the perfect fusion of classic soul, high-octane gears, and retro fashion...fun for the whole family! 

​📍 CASTING CALL DETAILS:
​DATE: Sunday, April 12th, 2026
​TIME: 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM
​LOCATION: 52 Rochester Public Market, Rochester, NY
HOW TO DRESS: All black attire, heels, & photo ready hair/makeup

​🏁 WHO WE NEED:
​ALL shapes, sizes, ages, and backgrounds. All men, women, and children are welcome—no experience required, just bring your good vibes and strut your stuff! 

🗣️ NOTE: Anyone UNDER 18 years of age will require parent/guardian consent to participate. Parents/Guardians must be present for casting, shoot(s), and/or show if casted. 

👀 ALL Models selected will be invited to a FREE Makeup Class hosted by THE Aud Makeup Artist (yours truly 💁‍♀️) 
*Details to be released at a later time. 

Who's ready to join the movement? Drop a 🔥 if we'll see you there! 

📸: @hoytephoto
Designs & Concept: @xstravagance_designs
#MakeupByAud

items.text:
Hi there,

My name is Kieran McKeown, and I'm an actor based in Scotland. I was wondering if anyone knew of any people or companies that deal in fight showreels around the Edinburgh and Glasgow areas. I'm trained in Muay Thai and have been for the last several years, and I wanted to put together a showreel that showcases my skills in a movie/TV style to make it more appealing to casting directors and such. If anyone has any information that would be helpful, please reply to this post or shoot me a dm. Thank you so much for your help and for reading this message!

items.text:
Casting Call - Student Short Film
Hi everyone! 

I’m casting for a Brunel University student short film titled Echoes of Time - a warm, emotional drama about a university student reconnecting with childhood memories during a difficult time. 

📍Location: Uxbridge, London

🗓️Shoot dates: 20, 22, 24 April 2026

❕Unpaid (student production), but travel expenses will be covered. 

✨Great opportunity for actors looking to collaborate on a meaningful, visually driven student project. 

If you have any questions, feel free to message me!

items.text:
ACTORS!

I will review your self tape or showreel within 24 hours and come back to you with in depth notes and directions on how to improve it and make it stand out with casting directors.

ALL BOOKINGS ARE STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL AND ALL MEDIA WILL BE DELETED AFTER THE BOOKING IS OVER.

I have been acting for 31 years, since I was 5, and in that time I have performed in West End, fringe theatre, off west end, tours, cruise ships, blockbuster films, feature films, short films and everything in between.
I have also been a casting director for the last 10 years, and have owned my own theatre and film production company for the last 4 years, so I have been involved in auditions from both sides of the table. I am also a well established writer/director and producer of theatre and film.

Needless to say, I’ve learned a few things.

No one ever teaches you how to properly record/edit a self tape, or what the most effective order all your clips should go in for your showreel, so that’s what I’m doing.

Ive also taken into account that most of us actors can’t afford hundreds of pounds on this services, so my review with two free reviews are only £20.

That’s it.

Book your slot here - https://distortedrebels.com/actor-resources/ols/products/showreelself-tape-review

I look forward to helping you!

Phoenix 🫶🏻

items.title: ACTORS!

items.text:
CASTING / BACKGROUND ACTORS 

22/03/26

CONCRETE FISH

**Logline **A hypnotic experimental short about exploration, vulnerability and community

**Small synopsis **A strange fish girl bursts through the water and stumbles into an alternative rave where she gets a hefty taste of the human experience.

Email: estheralli@outlook.com or mhmollie0303@icloud.com 

* **Shooting 3rd- 7th April E8 2PB**
* **Travel Expenses Paid**
* Graduate film hoping to go to festivals
* Holding online auditions.   
*  **SPHYNX** (Female, 19-24, Any ethnicity) 
   * Fresh out the closet sapphic, in a relationship with Lia. Adjusting to being open with her sexuality, still very insecure and anxious. 
* **KEITH** (19-25, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Regular lad, slightly airheaded, means well and is easy going. Must be open to getting a small flash tattoo on camera. 
* **NAT** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Sleazy, typical “macho man”. Quick to anger, prone to violence.Big ego, little emotional maturity. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 
* **WELLY** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
*  Friends with NAT, slightly less sleazy but still complicit. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography.

CASTING / BACKGROUND ACTORS 

22/03/26

CONCRETE FISH

**Logline **A hypnotic experimental short about exploration, vulnerability and community

**Small synopsis **A strange fish girl bursts through the water and stumbles into an alternative rave where she gets a hefty taste of the human experience.

Email: estheralli@outlook.com or mhmollie0303@icloud.com 

* **Shooting 3rd- 7th April E8 2PB**
* **Travel Expenses Paid**
* Graduate film hoping to go to festivals
* Holding online auditions.   
*  **SPHYNX** (Female, 19-24, Any ethnicity) 
   * Fresh out the closet sapphic, in a relationship with Lia. Adjusting to being open with her sexuality, still very insecure and anxious. 
* **KEITH** (19-25, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Regular lad, slightly airheaded, means well and is easy going. Must be open to getting a small flash tattoo on camera. 
* **NAT** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Sleazy, typical “macho man”. Quick to anger, prone to violence.Big ego, little emotional maturity. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 
* **WELLY** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
*  Friends with NAT, slightly less sleazy but still complicit. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 

If you'd like to see some visual concepts from the pitch click this link [https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true)

items.text:
🎬✨ Calling All Movie Lovers & BiG Dreamers ✨🎬

If you love movies… this is for You.

Whether you're into Acting, Storytelling, Filmmaking, or you just LOVE sittin in the Cinema gettin lost in a great film (like The Shawshank Redemption)… you’re invited 🎥🍿

We’ve created DBA aka DREAM BiG ARTiSTs Social Club:
A Fun, Lighthearted Community where we:

🍿 Go to the movies together
🎬 Organize regular cinema nights (twice a month)
🥂 Hang out, relax & connect
🤝 Meet Creatives, Artists & Great People
🍓 Share smoothies, simple foods & good vibes
💡 Enjoy fun, casual talks & ideas (nothing heavy)

No pressure. No cost. No expectations. Come as you are, Being You♥️

Just a space for people who love movies, creativity, and great energy.

So if you’ve ever gone to the cinema alone… or wished you had people to share that experience with…

This is your sign 👇

Join the group & come watch with us 🎥✨

items.text:
**SUSZEC woj. śląskie**

**11 kwietnia, sobota**

**film fabularny**

Do filmu fabularnego, lata 70te, szukam Statystów - **MĘŻCZYZN ok. 20-40 lat w charakterze PILOTÓW.**

**Stawka: 140 zł /dzień zdjęciowy lub 280 zł **dla panów, którzy zostaną wybrani do epizodu niemego. Płatne gotówką po planie.

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

**Wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy

obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką ,wygolone boki i kark, wycięte

wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **SUSZEC **

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: **tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu**

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text: Well, I've been literally crying all day today editing 'THE FORCE - The Michael Watson Story'. Three incredible but heartbreaking scenes with magnificent performances from Michael Gukas as 'Chris Eubank', Joyce Grey-Carter as 'Joan Watson' (Michael's mother) and Sam Gittins as 'Peter Hamlyn', the neurosurgeon that saved Michael's lifes. Don't let anyone 'ever' tell you that acting is not important, especially when telling true stories like this one. It is a beautiful craft, that when done superbly like this, gives us all a chance to escape from reality and dream dreams. I can't wait to show this important film to the world and especially to the man himself, Michael Watson 🙏❤🎬Xx

items.text:
Has your child appeared in a TV show? If yes then your voice matters more than ever. The TV Industry Human Rights Forum needs you and your perspectives for an important project on children's rights. Behind every young performer is a parent navigating unique opportunities, challenges, and decisions—and your experience can help shape a better future for families just like yours. Please complete this confidential survey and share it with others in your networks. You’ll be contributing valuable insights that can improve support systems, working conditions, and overall wellbeing for children on TV productions. Follow the survey link for more information about the project.

https://form.typeform.com/to/CMmqr4bD

items.text:
Hello everyone! I am so excited to be a new member of this group! I was recently accepted to the Atlantic Acting School Summer Intensive Program. This is a 6-week program that is designed to give students an insight to what a 2-year conservatory would be like. I have been acting for years and I am pursuing it as my career, this school is a step. 

Linked below is a GoFundMe for my tuition if anyone was interested in helping me pursue this dream. I know that everyone works hard for their money so if you are not in a position to help or you don't want to, trust me I get it. But I figured I would share. 

https://gofund.me/af912727b

Thank you all for your consideration <3 I would love to talk more.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL** - Australian TV Pilot "Next Big Thing". 

TV SHOW | COLLINGWOOD AREA | PAID

**Casting:**

Mateo - Male 21-26 (Must be able to sing)

Charlie - Male 20-25

**Date TBC:**

Mid-May, 3-4 filming days

**Chemistry read / Rehearsal:** 

Seddon

Next Big Thing is about young artists working to turn their passions into a reality. We follow a friend group of singers, actors and filmmakers as they navigate Melbourne’s Creative to try and become the ‘Next Big Thing’

This show will showcase all different kinds of young creatives, singers, actors, dancers, filmmakers and musicians, with musical performances taking place throughout the show to highlight the incredible young talent that Melbourne has to offer.

**If interested**, please email showreel and headshots to: level1203media@gmail.com

Please include your availability in Mid-May

You can also apply through Starnow using this link:

https://www.starnow.com/casting/pilot-project-next-big-thing-aussie-young-adult-tv-show-3126587/

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎خممرق LEVEL1203 EL 1203 LEVEL Aussie TV Show/Pilot Show/ Pilot Next Big Thing mg CASTING CASTINGNOV NOW‎'‎

May be an image of text that says 'LEV LEVEL1203 EL 1203 Synopsis Casting" "Next Big Thing," a pilot project for an Aussie Young adult TV show. 'Next Big Thing' about young artists working to turn their passions into a reality. The show follows a friend group of singers, actors, and filmmakers as they navigate Melbourne's Creative to try and become the 'Next Big Thing' This show will showcase all different kinds of young creatives, singers, actors, dancers, filmmakers and musicians, with musical performances taking place throughout the show to highlight the incredible young talent that Melbourne has to offer.'
May be an image of text

May be an image of text that says 'LEVEL1203 1203 LEV Casting Call Allen 18-28 28 18 Early to Mid 20s. Allen is an aspiring filmmaker who's recentl graduated uni, yet keeps procrastinating on finishing off his student film by jumping on as many different projects as possible. Allen is chaotic neutral with an unpredictable silver tongue. His brain moves faster than his mouth and usually he'll say what he thinks without thinking it through properly, though it never comes from a place of malice and is just his own way of trying to be friendly by making everyone around him laugh.'

May be an image of text that says 'LEVEL1203 1203 Important Info Please send an email expressing your interest to level1203media@gmail.com, level120 level1203media( along with a CV and a Showreel if you have one. Please include which role you are applying for. Please include your availabilities in ay. We will then contact you with the audition sides and request a self-tape. Actors may also be asked to do an in-person audition and/or chemistry read. Shooting will be in the Collingwood area (TBC), in early May, 2026. This is a PAID project!'

items.text:
The lost piano

Ich glaube, dass das Leben oft mehr durch das definiert wird, was wir nicht tun, als durch das, was wir tun. Obwohl der Film etwas traurig wirkt, liegt genau darin seine positive Botschaft. Es geht um verpasste Chancen, die wir täglich nutzen sollten.

Aus diesem Grund entfaltet sich meine Filmmusik erst ganz am Ende. Gib deinem Leben die Chance, die es braucht, um sich zu erfüllen.

Filmmusik und Sounddesign: Jürgen Hochfeld, 

[https://youtu.be/LxXKhNFLSIU](https://youtu.be/LxXKhNFLSIU)
items.previewDescription: I believe life is defined often by what we don't do than by what we do. Although the film has a somewhat melancholic feel, that's precisely where its positiv...

items.text:
Theaterpädagogik BuT®️ mit interkultureller Kompetenz

 

 

Du liebst Theater, Menschen und kulturelle Vielfalt?

 

Dann ist das deine Chance:

Am 07.04.2026 startet unsere anerkannte Weiterbildung Theaterpädagogik BuT®️ mit interkultureller Kompetenz 🌍✨

 

 

📚 Das erwartet dich:

•             13 Monate Vollzeit

•             1950 Unterrichtseinheiten inkl. 300 UE Praktikum

•             Unterricht: Mo–Fr, 09:00–16:00 Uhr

•             Praxisnahes Arbeiten mit Szenen, Projekten & Performances

•             Interkulturelle Kompetenz als fester Bestandteil der Ausbildung

•             BuT®️-anerkannt

 

🎓 Wichtig zu wissen:

Mit dem BuT®️-Abschluss ist auch eine Anerkennung als sozialpädagogische Fachkraft möglich

(nach § 11 Abs. 3 Nr. 1 VOKitaFöG und § 16 Abs. 3 Nr. 1 SchüFöVO).

 

Dieser Quereinstieg ist mit bestimmten Auflagen verbunden und kann in die Anerkennung als sozialpädagogische Fachkraft münden.

 

100% Förderbar mit BIldungsgutschein

 

 

Selbstzahler:innen sind herzlich Wilkommen. Auch für Selbstzahlende ist eine Förderung durch KOMPASS möglich.

 

 

📩 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung:

info@adkb-berlin.de

🌐 www.adkb-berlin.de

📞 030 – 405 35040

 

Bewirb Dich Jetzt!

 

Mach mit – und bring Theaterpädagogik & Vielfalt in Bewegung! 🎭💫

#Theaterpädagogik #Berlin #BuT #Weiterbildung #InterkulturelleKompetenz #adkb #Theaterliebe #Quereinstieg #Sozialpädagogik

items.text:
One For The Road CASTING CALL OPENED UP for “DAVE” SHOOTING DATES: 30th of April, 1st, 3rd of May 2026. Shooting in Holbeck, LEEDS. 

Dave and Rob have been best-friends for thirty years but when their favourite pub is due to close by the end of the night the pair fall out and twenty-two year old shop-lifter Jamie has to repair their friendship before the last bell.

 ‘One For The Road’ dives into masculinity, British identity, and the quiet weight of everyday working-class hardships. DAVE (40-60s) is a miserable, yorkshire man who has a very fatherly feel to him. 

If you’d like to apply please contact me privately or on instagram @georgiekayfilm

items.text:
Casting Call!!! 

Currently casting for a new TV show. Below are the requirements, if you know anyone who fits the bill, please get in touch ASAP!!! Drop me a DM!! 

✅ 18 - 24 year old white males
✅ Ideally from London
✅ Authentic London Accent 
✅ Ideally a free agent 
✅ Experience a bonus but not essential 
✅ Available to shoot from end of May

It is paid! Happy to explain more deets over a call!

topComments.text: Not sure if this was posted and only just accepted but, I know quite a few guys have sent out a message and taped as it needed to be cast asap, said they’d hear something back but haven’t. If you haven’t found the right person yet that’s fine but from an actors point - it’s always nice to hear back even if it’s a no

sharedPost.text:
At the premiere of my short film "Where Are The Children"? I had the joy of performing a couple of songs from my latest album "Speak on Out," including 'Save the Children' and 'Here I Stand.' 🎙🤎

What a night to cherish forever in my heart!

Purchase and stream my new short film "Where Are The Children"? (Raising child trafficking awareness) 👇🏾

https://www.leytonbenta.com/wherearethechildren

Latest album - Speak on out 👇🏾
www.leytonbenta.com/music

Leyton Benta Documentary 👇🏾
www.leytonbenta.com/documentary

Bookings/shows - general enquiries 👇🏾
www.leytonbenta.com/contact

Love Leyton 🤎

#LeytonBenta #leytonbentawhetearethechildrenshortfilm
#childtraffickingawareness #childtrafficking 
#SaveTheChildren #leytonbentaspeakonout

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM (*****Me & the Homies*****) – VANCOUVER**

Looking for an actor (Black or Latino, male-presenting, able to play 16–18) for a supporting role in an upcoming independent short film.

**About the Film:**
*Me & the Homies* is a grounded coming-of-age story based on a real night growing up in LA. It follows a group of teenage friends over one night that starts fun and slowly turns darker, exploring loyalty, pressure, and identity.

**Role: “Stats”**
Sharp, observant, and lowkey funny. Stats is always reading the room and calling things out with a dry edge. He feels like one of the guys, but he’s more calculated than he lets on. When things get serious, his instincts kick in, he knows when to push and when to fall back. Strong presence, natural delivery, and subtle performance are key.

**Details:**
* Shoot Dates: April 10, 11 (night shoots)
* Location: Vancouver
* Non-union / Indie / Unpaid (meals + footage provided)

If interested, please send:
* Headshot / recent photo
* Demo reel (if available)
* Age + contact info

Email: mysticstylezfilm@gmail.com

**Pay:** CA$25.00 - CA$35.00 per hour

Job description:

**Job Overview**

Two days: April 3rd and April 4th 12:30am - 5:30pm

Join our vibrant team as a Mascot Performer / Actor, where you will bring joy, excitement, and memorable experiences to audiences of all ages! In this lively role, you will embody the beloved Easter Bunny for photo shoots, engage with guests through energetic performances, and create magical moments that leave lasting impressions.

Easter Bunny Costume provided.

Your enthusiasm and creativity will help foster a fun and welcoming environment, making the attraction unforgettable. This paid position offers an exciting opportunity to showcase your acting talents while spreading happiness in a dynamic setting.

**Responsibilities**
* Perform as designated Easter Bunny mascot with lively energy, ensuring authentic and engaging portrayals
* Interact with guests, especially children, through playful gestures, poses, and storytelling to enhance their experience and to capture a precious memory picture
* Participate in costume fitting and tuition to perfect character and movements
* Maintain character integrity throughout performances while adhering to safety guidelines

This role is perfect for energetic performers who love entertaining others and thrive in lively environments. We value creativity, enthusiasm, and a passion for making people smile!

PM me and please forward relevant experience and recent photo.

topComments.text: I’m playful , I’d definitely do it

message.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Lisa Seidl, LLM über digitale Plattformen schaffen Macht-Assymetrien und neue Abhängigkeiten.

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 167. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 07.04.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Marion Rossmann 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber 

Casting und Besetzung international – worauf kommt es wirklich an? 

Marion Rossmann ist eine erfahrene Casting Directorin mit über zwei Jahrzehnten Erfahrung in der Film- und Fernsehbranche. Sie hat an zahlreichen nationalen und internationalen Produktionen mitgewirkt. In ihrem Vortrag gibt sie Einblicke in den internationalen Casting-Prozess, berichtet über Unterschiede und Gemeinsamkeiten zwischen verschiedenen Ländern, erklärt die Anforderungen an Schauspieler*innen für internationale Produktionen und gibt praktische Tipps zur Vorbereitung auf (internationale) Castings. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die in der Film- und Fernsehbranche tätig sind oder sich für internationale Besetzungsprozesse und Karrieremöglichkeiten interessieren. 

© Ch. Pilsl 

📲 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at 
und https://fb.me/e/6KqWp3MQS 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna  #schauspiel #acting #casting

items.text:
Hi there,

My name is Kieran McKeown, and I'm an actor based in Scotland. I was wondering if anyone knew of any people or companies that deal in fight showreels around the Edinburgh and Glasgow areas. I'm trained in Muay Thai and have been for the last several years, and I wanted to put together a showreel that showcases my skills in a movie/TV style to make it more appealing to casting directors and such. If anyone has any information that would be helpful, please reply to this post or shoot me a dm. Thank you so much for your help and for reading this message!

topComments.text:
There’s the other option of finding people to do your own shorts with - people with similar goals. 

If you’re wanting to show off fighting skills for use on film I’d suggest also training in screen/stage combat - being able to fight well is different to fighting for the screen

items.text:
🎬 POSZUKIWANA CHARAKTERYZATORKA / CHARAKTERYZATOR – FILM FABULARNY "JALAPENO 2"
**Lokalizacja:** Kraków **Termin:** Kwiecień (8 dni zdjęciowych)

**O PROJEKCIE:** Szukamy osoby charakteryzacji na planie niezależnego filmu fabularnego „Jalapeno 2”. Szukamy kogoś zorganizowanego, kto potrafi utrzymać ciągłość charakteryzacji w trakcie ujęć i dubli.
**Wizualia i Estetyka:** Gęsty klimat, low light, dym i kontrast. Świecimy miękko z dominantą zieleni. 
Więcej o projekcie
👉  https://app.milanote.com/1VOPeW1ObDcLdb?p=nGhwX8xtxUL

**ZADANIA:**
* Przygotowanie aktorów do scen (makeup naturalny +  efekty FX: pot, krew, rany, blizny). Ogólnie będzie tego sporo ;)
* Dyżurowanie na planie (poprawki w trakcie przerw między dublami).
* Dbanie o ciągłość wizualną postaci.

**WARUNKI:**
* **Finanse:** Projekt realizowany w modelu non-profit, ale możemy rozważyć wynagrodzenie za projekt
* **Materiały:** Zapewniamy budżet na zakup niezbędnych środków lub pełny zwrot kosztów za zużyte materiały własne.
* **Logistyka:** Zapewniamy wyżywienie i napoje na planie oraz świetną atmosferę pracy w profesjonalnym zespole.

**KONTAKT:** Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o przesłanie krótkiego portfolio lub zdjęć swoich prac w wiadomości prywatnej DM.

* **Materiały:** Zapewniamy budżet na zakup niezbędnych środków lub pełny zwrot kosztów za zużyte materiały własne.
* **Logistyka:** Zapewniamy wyżywienie i napoje na planie oraz świetną atmosferę pracy w profesjonalnym zespole.

**KONTAKT:** Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o przesłanie krótkiego portfolio lub zdjęć swoich prac w wiadomości prywatnej DM.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: LONDON ONTARIO

Hi everyone, I am a first-year film student at Fanshawe.  I am directing a thriller short film called “Redacted” .We are looking for three main roles: 

**Synopsis**

Dianna Sloan is one of the best; she solves cases faster than anyone. She falls asleep and wakes up the next morning with the answer. When Sergeant Ryder gives her one of the hardest cases regarding a Mob Boss, her dream is what helps her solve it. Dianna Sloan fights to change how the dream ends, so it will not become a reality. The catch is that she is the one who really needs to be caught, to truly solve the case.

**Dianna Sloan **(20s-30s) - Female

A lead badass FBI detective, she will take on any case and is confident she will make it out alive every time, after a supernatural experience the case is seen in a new light.

**Sergeant Ryder **(20s-30s) Male

The FBI sergeant cares about what Dianna gets herself into, but is always there to help her out. Sergeant Ryder is strict about getting the job done, but is still the world’s best boss.

**Mob Boss **(20s-30s) Male

 A powerful man who gets what he wants and is willing to put up a fight. He is the type of person you do not want to mess with.

These are UNPAID roles

We are aiming to shoot over the next two weeks 

If you are interested in one of these roles, you can reach me via Gmail at R3DACTEDFilm@gmail.com

items.text:
🎬 CALLING ALL CREATIVES– FULL CREW WANTED (LOS ANGELES) 🎬  

We’re assembling a passionate, driven team to bring a full-length feature film to life — and we’re looking for creatives who want to build something meaningful from the ground up.

📍 Location: Los Angeles (on-location shoots)  
🗓 Shoot Dates: May 10 – June 10  

Logline:

A man who built his life on control must lose everything before he can learn how to truly live.  

We are currently looking to fill the following positions 

- Executive producer

Directing department 

- 1st AD
- 2nd AD
- Script supervisor 

Lighting Department 

- Gaffer
- Lighting technician 

Sound Department 

- Sound Mixer
- Boom operator 

Production department 

- Art director 
- Costume designer 
- Make up artist 
- Hair stylist 
- Production (on location) manager
- Assistant Production manager 

Visuals

- Graphic designer/VFX artist 

This is a no-budget, passion-driven project, but we’re creating a professional, collaborative environment with a team that’s serious about storytelling and execution. Meals and transportation will be provided at no cost to crew and supplied daily. 

  What you’ll get:
• A chance to be part of a full feature film production  
• Hands-on experience and real set collaboration  
• Networking with a dedicated creative team  
• Meals provided daily (on us) 🍽  
• Transportation covered (on us) 🚐  
• A project you can truly put your name on and be proud of

🎥 This is for filmmakers who are hungry to create, grow, and be part of something bigger than just another short or side project. We’re building a team that shows up, collaborates, and pushes each other to make something great. We only admire bringing your good vibes on set and creating a positive and free creative environment for everybody, then we’ll be more than willing to have you on board.

If you’re interested, please fill out this form  below or reach out via email disconnectedmovie2026@gmail.com

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1bFADoV10oTGB2Qb4AdMHoWRFVmvkHLb-ixG6mHlW758/edit?ts=69c471bf

Let’s make something special. 🚀

items.text:
Remembering Nikolay Kolyada — The Sun of Russian Drama 🎭

What does it take to keep a theatre alive—not for a season, but for over 20 years?

In this lecture, I speak about my time in Yekaterinburg, watching my first Russian play, and then unexpectedly sitting down with Nikolay Kolyada.

There’s a section in the video where I include part of that interview. In it, Kolyada speaks about how his theatre actually runs — the actors, the performances, the reality of sustaining it without state funding.

Our conversation went on for much longer. We spoke about directing, the audience, how actors work, and the difference between Western theatre and Russian theatre — whether you start from the head, or from the heart.

What stayed with me is how everything in that theatre is driven by necessity.
They have to keep working. Keep performing. Keep the theatre alive.

That’s what this lecture is really about — not just who he was, but how that kind of work is built, and sustained over time.

Watch the full lecture here:
https://youtu.be/4XP9g-0gOSE?si=BiAU5qoWsboXEGZR

sharedPost.text:
Remembering one of contemporary Russian theatre’s most prolific—and relentless—figures, Nikolay Kolyada 🎭

Often called “The Sun of Russian Drama,” Kolyada was a playwright, director, teacher, and founder of his own independent theatre—built not on state support, but on sheer necessity, discipline, and an unbreakable commitment to the work. He wrote over 150 plays, trained a generation of playwrights, and created a living, breathing theatre that performed up to 70 times a month.

His philosophy was simple, but unforgiving: captivate the artist, and pay them. Keep the work moving. Keep the theatre alive.

He didn’t just make theatre—he built a system where theatre could survive.

Wishing you a moment today to remember the artists who dedicate their lives entirely to the craft.

#kolyada #russiantheatre #acting #vlytartacting

items.text:
🌿✨ **STATISTER SØGES – MØDRE MED BARN** ✨🌿

Vil du og dit barn være med i en hyggelig optagelse i smukke, naturlige omgivelser? 🎬💚

Vi søger **mødre med barn** til at agere statister i en havescene. Det bliver en rolig og hyggelig dag med fokus på nærvær og naturlige øjeblikke 🌸

👩‍👧 **Hvem søger vi?**

* Mødre med barn/børn på maks 10 år.

* Jer der har lyst til at være foran kamera i uformelle rammer

* Ingen erfaring nødvendig

📍 Juulsøgaarden: Lavenvej 22, 8600 Skanderborg.

⏰ lørdag og søndag (4 og 5 april)

💰 Jobbet er ulønnet - I vil dog være garanteret en sjov og hyggelig dag, samt jeres navn på rollelisten🙌

Lyder det som noget for jer? 💫

Eller vil du bare høre lidt mere?…

..Send en mail til darchyproductions@gmail.com eller send en direkte besked til mig – vi glæder os til at høre fra jer!

Del meget gerne opslaget 🙏

items.text: Statister søges til optagelser i København.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'STATISTER SOGES I forbindelse med optagelserne til en ny, dansk spillefilm soger Hyane Film statister (15+) af alle kon/typer, kon/ der har lyst til at spille passagerer en metro. Dato: Tirsdag. april Lokation: Kebenhavn Tidsrum: 11.15-13.45 Som tak for din medvirken vil du modtage en biografbillet, og vi vil selvfolgelig gore vores bedste for at skabe en god og spzendende oplevelse! Vil du vaere med? Send en mail til statist@hyaenefilm.dk, statist@hya og vedhaeft et vellignende foto + fulde navn, alder, telefonnummer og e-mail. Du bedes skrive folgende i emnefeltet: "METRO" Vi glaeder OS meget til at hore fra dig!'

OPEN CASTING CALL (casting for supporting roles)

Please send any submissions to: theanswershortfilm26@gmail.com

Logline:
A respected working actor appears to have everything, career momentum, a loving family, and control over his life, until subtle cracks reveal he may be performing the very reality he refuses to confront.

Location: Los Angeles 

Submission Deadline: April 1st 

Shoot Date: April 18th

Non Paid/Non Union

MEGAN: Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity On set Makeup Artist. Warm, friendly, intuitive. SARAH: Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity Actress. Present, responsive, grounded. RACHEL: Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity Relaxed, Social, easygoing. NICOLE: Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity Quiet, observant, friend of Rachel 1ST AD: OPEN GENDER, 30s, Open Ethnicity Authoritative, effiecent, composed. Email headshots & reel to TheAnswerShortfilm26@gmail.com Decline Decline Acceb'

items.text:
DONNA GROSSMAN CASTING  -NOW CASTING — ACTOR MOMS WITH THEIR OWN 6 - 8 MONTH OLD BABY

Non‑Union • Goat Milk for Babies

We’re casting a real mother, who is an actor, and her baby for a warm, authentic, user-generated style video campaign.

Production is looking for a genuine, playful mother-baby connection, and the natural rhythm that only comes from a real parent and child.

MOM
25–35 years old

Dark hair / US Latina or mixed‑race look preferred, but open to all

Strong with conversational copy (NO ACCENTS)

Warm, natural, responsive to baby, comfortable ad‑libbing

BABY
6–8 months old

Expressive, curious, babbly, sweet

Not too much hair (still very baby‑like)

RATES + USAGE
Mom Session: $750 + 20%

Baby Session: $500 + 20%

Mom Usage (If Final video/stills are used): $7,000 + 20%

Baby Usage (If Final video/stills are used): $3,000 + 20%

Usage: 1‑year worldwide digital/social (no broadcast)

ONE SHOOT DAY:
Week of April 6 or April 13

To submit, please email Dgcasting@donnagrossmancasting.com with your name, your baby’s age, and recent photos.

* Special Note: Baby will not need to drink goat milk.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of baby
May be an image of baby, smiling and sleepwear
May be an image of baby and smiling
May be an image of baby, smiling and sleepwear

items.text:
We are an Independent production company looking to establish ourselves with our filmmaking debut & we are looking for our leading lady to join our team!

         The character has a business mindset with greedy intentions that has a unique fashion sense. It's important to us that you're comfortable with our wardrobe requests...Our vision for the character is she wears a variety of outfits in a leather jacket & cozy sweaters with leather pants, & long boots preferably flat not heel.

Short film (Around 40 min.)
Film will be entered in film festivals. 
Pay: $1,000 + IMDb credit 
*If you're interested, send a headshot,  link to your IMDb page (if you have one), & link to your Instagram to this email: deowainstaproductions@gmail.com 

We will send a follow-up email with a short slide (scene) for you to make an audition tape for us. 

We will appreciate it if you go support our Instagram & YouTube channel! Upon doing so we will keep you in mind for opportunities in our future film projects!

https://www.instagram.com/deowainsta_productions?igsh=MTNoM3JzaGl2bjZ6OQ==

https://youtube.com/@deowainstaproductions?si=sJs83boxoJO_7oTA

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call Female lead, age 21-35 Native American, Latina, or Asian 4 days of filming in upstate N.Y. (Adirondack region) lodging & meals/ catering will be provided *You are responsible for travel expenses if coming from out of state You will be paid a flat rate Must be comfortable doing scenes outdoors in the cold & walking along a snow covered trail in a forest setting. The film is a psychological thriller based on Native American folklore'

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – Modowy!
Artystyczny film modowy | Epizody + joga

Szukamy wyjątkowych twarzy i osobowości do pięknego, stylowego projektu w klimacie fashion & art ✨

🔍 KOGO SZUKAMY?

🌍 Do wszystkich ról – mile widziana różnorodność etniczna

👔 Kelner (M 40–50)

Elegancki, zadbany, przystojny, międzynarodowy look

💼 Bankier (M 35–50)

Silna, męska osobowość, typ ekskluzywnego szefa (mile widziani modele)

👧👦 Dzieci (8–10 lat)

Urocze, charakterystyczne, z doświadczeniem przed kamerą

🕺💃 Goście (20–60 lat)

Typy fashion, wyraziste osobowości, reagujące na „absurdalne sytuacje”

🧘 Jogini (20–40 lat)

Min. poziom średniozaawansowany

➡️ ok. 10–15 osób

➡️ różne sylwetki i typy urody

➡️ statystowanie z wizerunkiem

📅 TERMINY

🛑 Zgłoszenia: do 29.03 (niedziela) do 14:00

📞 Recall: 01–03.04 (1 dzień)

👗 Przymiarki: 07–08.04 (1 dzień)

🎥 Zdjęcia: 11–14.04 (OBOWIĄZKOWA dostępność wszystkie dni)

💰 STAWKI

🎭 Epizodysta

• 1500 zł / dzień

• 3500 zł prawa

👶 Epizodysta – dziecko

• 800 zł / dzień

• 2000 zł prawa

🧘 Jogin

• 500 zł dzień

• 500 zł prawa

⸻

🎥 SELFTAPE

Wszyscy:

➡️ wizytówka po angielsku

🧘 Jogini: wizytówka + pokaz umiejętności (np. z treningu)

👧👦 Dzieci: wizytówka + emocje (zaskoczenie, śmiech, smutek, zamyślenie)

⸻

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA

⏰ Deadline: 29.03 do 14:00 juz do produkcji.

Proszę o zgłaszanie się na adres mailowy:plan@filmakcja.pl

W tytule proszę wpisać rolę.

W mailu proszę umieścić- imię, nazwisko, wiek, tel, wyraźne zdjęcia oraz wizytówkę.📇 

Podeślę wybranym link do zgłoszeń, kartę oraz scenkę.

Marta Film-Akcja😊🎞️💰

🎬 CASTING – Modowy!
Artystyczny film modowy | Epizody + joga

Szukamy wyjątkowych twarzy i osobowości do pięknego, stylowego projektu w klimacie fashion & art ✨

🔍 KOGO SZUKAMY?

🌍 Do wszystkich ról – mile widziana różnorodność etniczna

👔 Kelner (M 40–50)

Elegancki, zadbany, przystojny, międzynarodowy look

💼 Bankier (M 35–50)

Silna, męska osobowość, typ ekskluzywnego szefa (mile widziani modele)

👧👦 Dzieci (8–10 lat)

Urocze, charakterystyczne, z doświadczeniem przed kamerą

🕺💃 Goście (20–60 lat)

Typy fashion, wyraziste osobowości, reagujące na „absurdalne sytuacje”

🧘 Jogini (20–40 lat)

Min. poziom średniozaawansowany

➡️ ok. 10–15 osób

➡️ różne sylwetki i typy urody

➡️ statystowanie z wizerunkiem

📅 TERMINY

🛑 Zgłoszenia: do 29.03 (niedziela) do 14:00

📞 Recall: 01–03.04 (1 dzień)

👗 Przymiarki: 07–08.04 (1 dzień)

🎥 Zdjęcia: 11–14.04 (OBOWIĄZKOWA dostępność wszystkie dni)

💰 STAWKI

🎭 Epizodysta

• 1500 zł / dzień

• 3500 zł prawa

👶 Epizodysta – dziecko

• 800 zł / dzień

• 2000 zł prawa

🧘 Jogin

• 500 zł dzień

• 500 zł prawa

⸻

🎥 SELFTAPE

Wszyscy:

➡️ wizytówka po angielsku

🧘 Jogini: wizytówka + pokaz umiejętności (np. z treningu)

👧👦 Dzieci: wizytówka + emocje (zaskoczenie, śmiech, smutek, zamyślenie)

⸻

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA

⏰ Deadline: 29.03 do 14:00 juz do produkcji.

Proszę o zgłaszanie się na adres mailowy:plan@filmakcja.pl

W tytule proszę wpisać rolę.

W mailu proszę umieścić- imię, nazwisko, wiek, tel, wyraźne zdjęcia oraz wizytówkę.📇 

Podeślę wybranym link do zgłoszeń, kartę oraz scenkę.

Marta Film-Akcja😊🎞️💰

sharedPost.text:
🎥 Montaż demo aktorskiego z konsultacją 

Potrzebujesz demo aktorskiego, które pokaże Twój talent aktorski i wszechstronność a jednocześnie będzie zgodne z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu? Chcesz dowiedzieć się jak pobierać materiały i jak tworzyć takie demo samemu w przyszłości w łatwy sposób oraz jak zwiększyć swoje szanse na konkretną role? Jeżeli tak to zapraszam do skorzystania z mojej usługi 🙂 

✅ dokładnie przejrzę Twoje aktorskie materiały, wybiorę najlepsze aktorsko sceny oraz różnorodne pod względem emocji i ról

✅ zmontuję demo zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu uwzględniając również to, które sceny Ty uważasz za najlepsze 

✅ podczas konsultacji opowiem Ci o obecnych standardach montażu i doboru scen, dam dużo cennych rad abyś mogła / mógł w przyszłości montować demo samodzielnie 

✅ gotowe demo dostaniesz ode mnie maksymalnie w 2 dni od wysłania mi swoich materiałów

✅ przystępna cena 💵 szczegóły na priv 

Na zdjęciach załączam jedną z wiadomość od klienta po moim montażu 🔥💪 

Uwaga! Nie zajmuję się pobieraniem materiałów.

items.text:
Hej!

Chorzów/Zabrze/Katowice/Oświęcim 

Szukamy 2–3 kobiet w wieku 27–30 lat do udziału w materiałach reklamowych dla sklepu z bielizną.

Zależy nam przede wszystkim na naturalnym pokazaniu naszej grupy docelowej – kobiecości, stylu i codziennych sytuacji. Udział nie wymaga pełnego występowania w bieliźnie – stawiamy na subtelność i estetykę.

Idealna szansa na zbudowanie portfolio ze względu na występ popularnych twarzy 

**Oferujemy:**

– udział w projekcie reklamowym - można użyć do swojego portfolio 

– dowolny zestaw bielizny do wyboru

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowana lub chcesz dowiedzieć się więcej – napisz wiadomość prywatną lub zostaw komentarz
